message:
test(fcp-conformance/streaming-reconnect): pin ReconnectConfig backoff floor/ceiling/jitter + handler counter contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-tda90)

22 tests covering the reconnect-storm primitives every websocket /
SSE / long-poll connector relies on:
- delay_for_attempt floor (MIN_RECONNECT_DELAY 100ms) yielding to
  explicit lower max_delay
- ceiling clamps at max_delay even at high attempt counts
- ±20% jitter bounded uniform via 200-sample probe
- NaN/+inf/negative backoff_multiplier guards (no panic via
  Duration::from_secs_f64)
- with_unlimited_attempts clears max_attempts
- record_failure saturating_add (cannot wrap u32::MAX → 0)
- reset zeros, can_reconnect honours None=unlimited /
  Some(max)=attempts<max
- exponential growth deterministic without jitter
- documented constants (MIN=100ms, DEFAULT=1s, MAX=30s)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
